adr_entry:
No ADR required.

Rationale: US-012 adds tier filtering through a pure domain function in `src/domain/filterCards.ts`, a `TierFilter` UI component in `src/ui/TierFilter/`, and state wiring in the existing `BrowseAllCards.tsx`. This is a contained feature addition within established conventions — pure domain logic in `src/domain/`, shared UI components in `src/ui/`, CSS Modules for scoped styling per ADR-004, and tier color tokens already defined in `tokens.css`. No new dependencies, architectural patterns, module boundaries, or routing changes are introduced. The plan correctly keeps tier filter state independent from future category filter state (as the ticket notes require). Both existing ADRs (ADR-004 shell layout, ADR-017 hash router) are unaffected.
